title: Toy Tank!
concept: ToyTank is a 3D action platformer where you have to go from point A to point B using your tank skills... You must go through all the different levels and escape from the room.
technology: Custom C++ engine made from scratch using Visual Studio
contribution: As a gameplay programmer, my contribution where:

contributionList.contribution: Implemented a path editor that used Bezier curve
Implemented the animations at the beginning of the levels
In charge of searching and implementing sounds effects for the game

title: Eyes of Minerva
concept: Eyes of Minerva is a stealth first person puzzle game, where the player will traverse a maze of rooms riddled with enemies looking to eliminate the player. The players will have to use all the tools at their disposal to either distract or disable the enemies
contribution: As a gameplay programmer and level designer, my contribution where:

contributionList.contribution: Developed the turret enemy and its different variations
Contributed on the implementation of the boss
Contributed on the implementation of the boss room
Designed the last level before the boss fight

title: StrawssBerry
concept: StrawssBerry is a 2D platform game where you have to solve challenging puzzles on a dangerous dark world to reach the end and discover the truth. Guide Strawss on his journey throug different levels, managing wisely the habilities while you help him finding out the secrets of his past and heritage.
technology: Custom C++ engine made from scratch using Visual Studio
contribution: As a gameplay programmer, my contribution where:

contributionList.contribution: Developed and structured the enemy class hierarchy and behavior architecture
Developed the enemy with the crossbow and the mage
Implemented the animations for the knight
Implemented animations for the ghost and posesion of all characters
